section_miscategorizations.text: He has a diagnosis of type 2 diabetes with an A1c of 7.2.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The A1c value is an objective lab result and belongs in the Objective section; however, its presence in Assessment as part of problem synthesis is not seriously misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: Order a blood glucose monitoring log and schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This single statement contains two distinct plan items (ordering a log and scheduling follow-up). While both belong in Plan, best organization would separate them; this is a minor structural issue, not a true miscategorization.
